rules.description: Warn when user used Islamic vocabulary but response contains no Islamic vocabulary, mirroring may have failed. NOTE: Arabic-script entries in condition_keywords and patterns require normalize_arabic() normalization in the engine to work correctly for Arabic-native input. POC operates on message_en and response_en (English), so romanized forms (allah, inshallah, etc.) cover all current use cases.

action.message: User used Islamic vocabulary but response contains no Islamic vocabulary, cultural mirroring may have failed.
